**Silence text prompt source**: Generated by the Perception subsystem. MicroExpNet detects micro-expressions; YOLO detects face presence and gaze direction. Combined into a descriptive text prompt (e.g., "user is watching attentively, looks slightly curious").

**Multi-character**: Single character per window for MVP. Architecture supports hot-swapping (different Live2D model + LoRA + Persona).

**Distribution**: Source code + conda environment for MVP. Users clone the repository, create the environment, and run locally.
